query:
SELECT 'books_test_or_demo' AS audit, COUNT(*) AS n, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(id,':',COALESCE(title,'(null)')) SEPARATOR ' | ') AS rows_found FROM books WHERE title LIKE 'Test Book%' OR title LIKE '%demo%' OR title LIKE '%placeholder%' OR title LIKE '%fake%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'books_total', COUNT(*), '' FROM books
UNION ALL SELECT 'moodLogs_demo', COUNT(*), '' FROM moodLogs WHERE COALESCE(notes,'') LIKE '%demo%' OR COALESCE(notes,'') LIKE '%fake%' OR COALESCE(notes,'') LIKE '%seed%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'moodLogs_total', COUNT(*), '' FROM moodLogs
UNION ALL SELECT 'moodSignals_total', COUNT(*), '' FROM moodSignals
UNION ALL SELECT 'assignmentSubmissions_demo', COUNT(*), '' FROM assignmentSubmissions WHERE COALESCE(filename,'') LIKE '%demo%' OR COALESCE(filename,'') LIKE '%fake%' OR COALESCE(filename,'') LIKE '%placeholder%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'assignmentSubmissions_total', COUNT(*), '' FROM assignmentSubmissions;
